source.title: Shoulder Pain: Diagnosis, Treatment and Referral Guidelines for Primary, Community and Intermediate Care
source.population: Adults with common shoulder conditions in primary, community, or intermediate care.
source.setting: Primary, community, and intermediate musculoskeletal care.
source.exclusions: Exact for shoulder red flags, broad assessment, subacromial pain, frozen shoulder, glenohumeral arthritis, and instability; international and partial for a generic UAE shoulder-pain workflow.

exact_location.heading: Shared Decision Making and Urgent Red Flag Referrals for the Shoulder

source.evidence_paraphrase: Requires direct clinician-patient decisions and lists infection, unreduced dislocation, tumour, traumatic acute cuff tear, and inflammatory disease as urgent concern contexts.

items.rationale: Supports entered shoulder red flags for shoulder-impingement review; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Supports rotator-cuff or impingement terminology and history covering hand dominance, occupation, activity, pain location, radiation, onset, duration, aggravating factors, trauma, comorbidities, red flags, and passive external rotation.

source.title: Shoulder Pain: Diagnosis, Treatment and Referral Guidelines for Primary, Community and Intermediate Care
source.population: Adults with common shoulder conditions in primary, community, or intermediate care.
source.setting: Primary, community, and intermediate musculoskeletal care.
source.exclusions: Exact for shoulder red flags, broad assessment, subacromial pain, frozen shoulder, glenohumeral arthritis, and instability; international and partial for a generic UAE shoulder-pain workflow.

exact_location.heading: Subacromial Shoulder Pain — definition and diagnosis

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports rotator-cuff or impingement terminology and history covering hand dominance, occupation, activity, pain location, radiation, onset, duration, aggravating factors, trauma, comorbidities, red flags, and passive external rotation.

items.rationale: Supports clinician assessment of subacromial shoulder pain for shoulder-impingement review; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Supports selected two-view radiography, states ultrasound or MRI is rarely indicated without an agreed specialist pathway, and links persistent symptoms to clinician-arranged referral.

exact_location.heading: Subacromial Shoulder Pain — imaging and referral

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports selected two-view radiography, states ultrasound or MRI is rarely indicated without an agreed specialist pathway, and links persistent symptoms to clinician-arranged referral.

items.rationale: Supports imaging and referral context for shoulder-impingement review; no decision is generated.
